report.summary: UX audit of 4 recently published pages with 11 issues found and fixed, plus 4 new OG images created for social sharing coverage.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: TradingViewChart: Added onerror handler with styled fallback message for CDN failures
Initia ecosystem: Fixed stats grid minmax 200px→140px for mobile overflow prevention
Initia ecosystem: Fixed feature cards grid minmax 280px→220px for mobile
Initia ecosystem: Added aria-hidden to decorative emoji icons for screen reader accessibility
Maple Finance: Increased table fontSize from 13px to 14px across all 3 data tables
Maple Finance: Increased tag badge padding from 2px/8px to 4px/10px and fontSize 11→12 for readability
Maple Finance: Increased CTA button padding from 10px/28px to 12px/32px for 44px touch targets
DeFi Points guide: Fixed related articles grid minmax 250px→200px for mobile
Ethereum Blob Space guide: Fixed related learning paths grid minmax 250px→200px for mobile

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG image: defi-points-airdrop-farming-guide-2026 (1200x630 SVG, indigo-cyan accent)
OG image: ethereum-blob-space-economics-guide (1200x630 SVG, cyan-amber accent with blob shapes)
OG image: initia-ecosystem (1200x630 SVG, amber-indigo accent with connected nodes)
OG image: maple-finance-ecosystem (1200x630 SVG, multi-accent with gradient circles)

sections.title: Metadata Updates
items: Updated Initia page openGraph/twitter metadata to reference new OG image with full URL
Updated Maple Finance page openGraph/twitter metadata to reference new OG image with full URL
Verified DeFi Points and Ethereum Blob Space pages already had correct OG image references
